title: Resolution Honoring SPD Officer Jamie Pastorello
summary: Donna Moore presents item 29, a resolution honoring Police Officer Jamie Pastorello for exemplary service and community compassion during a December 2025 incident. Co-sponsored with Councilors Caldwell and Jones-Rowser. All councilors join the resolution.
raw_content:
[00:30:51] >> Uh I also have item 29 um in conjunction
[00:30:56] with councilors Caldwell and Jones
[00:30:58] Rouseer. It's a resolution honoring
[00:31:00] police officer Jamie Ptoello.
[00:31:05] >> And then you need all of us too.
[00:31:07] >> If you all I will.
[00:31:11] >> Yeah, I would. I met him last week at a
[00:31:13] lunchon and I'm just tremendously
[00:31:16] honored for it. But police officers do
[00:31:19] not get always get enough credit for the
[00:31:22] good that they do in our community. So,
[00:31:25] um, we are honored to honor this young
[00:31:28] man. Thank you. [clears throat]
[00:31:30] >> Thank you.
[00:31:31] >> Thank you.
[00:31:32] >> Yeah, that's it.
[00:31:33] >> Councelor Williams.
[00:31:34] >> Thank you very much, Madam President. I
